benefits.description: Uses KLOW and Wolverine blend together; KPV and GHK-cu described as anti-inflammatory for aches and pains

protocol_notes: Recommends reconstituting 80mg KLOW vial with 2ml bac water and injecting 10 units (0.1ml) daily, yielding 2.5mg GHK-cu and 0.5mg BPC/TB4/KPV daily. Suggests adding Wolverine blend on top to bring BPC and TB4 dose to 1mg/day. Uses both KLOW and Wolverine concurrently but notes uncertainty about incremental benefit of KPV and GHK over Wolverine alone.
